title: [lora_l2.c:329] lichen_lora_l2_start radio config struct local to function
description: Function: lichen_lora_l2_start. Resource ownership: The lora_modem_config struct (lines 379-387) is stack-allocated and passed to lora_config(). If lora_config() stores a pointer to this struct rather than copying it, subsequent radio operations would access invalid stack memory. Zephyr's lora_config() should copy the config, but this is driver-dependent. The sx126x and sx127x drivers in Zephyr do copy. Priority 3 - driver contract assumption, verified correct for known drivers.
close_reason: Fixed: Added comment documenting that lora_config() copies struct values (sx12xx_lora_config uses memcpy, rylr_config reads fields) and does not retain a pointer, so stack-local config is safe.
